name: plugin-toolkit
description: Plugin/skill development + maintenance toolkit. /skill-heal audits a plugin's skill set against current best practices. /plugin-scaffold bootstraps a new plugin with proper structure. /version-bump cascades version updates across plugin.json + marketplace.json + bundle + RELEASE-NOTES. /docs-audit cross-checks CLAUDE.md + README + marketplace.json against disk state. /code-glossary builds a functionality glossary for any codebase — labels every function by what it does (not how it's written), clusters duplicates across files, identifies extractable DRY candidates. Composable — skills can invoke each other and integrate with @ship.
